question: I need to choose an existing Stellar wallet, oracle, anchor, DEX, or indexer to integrate. What workflow avoids a shallow name list?

golden.answer: Use Stellar Integration Finder. Clarify the required capability and constraints, discover candidates through short directory queries and semantic neighbors, inspect canonical project details and supporting content, compare integration-relevant evidence, then route the chosen dependency to the matching build skill. Recommend only supported candidates and state coverage gaps.
keyFacts: Starts from capability and constraints, then discovers and compares concrete integration candidates.
Routes the selected dependency to the appropriate deeper build workflow.
avoid: Do NOT rank integrations from name recognition alone.
Do NOT claim compatibility, maintenance, or regional support absent from the returned evidence.
golden.notes: Best-source case for the bundled Stellar Integration Finder skill.

sources.note: Fetch-verified local path exists and defines the exercised contract/workflow.
